name: Berry-Banana-Walnut Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup mashed strawberries or raspberries (about 1 1/2 cups whole berries)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, baking soda, nutmeg, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. In another bowl, stir together eggs, sugar, mashed berries, banana, oil, and orange peel.
3. Add the flour mixture to the berry mixture, stirring just until combined.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Pour into a greased 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 60 to 70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from pan and cool on a rack.
9. Wrap and store overnight.
Makes 1 loaf
Berry-Banana-Walnut Bread
Prepare as above, except omit strawberries or raspberries and stir in 1 cup fresh or frozen WHOLE blueberries with the nuts.
